description_long: This object consists of two large, thick books stacked horizontally, with a third book propped open and leaning against the stack. The books have dark green, textured covers with a slightly worn appearance, and the visible pages are yellowed, suggesting age or frequent use. The top book's cover features a rectangular, faded gold label with embossed text, while the lower books have similar labels but are less prominent. The covers have a subtle, embossed pattern that adds to the tactile quality. The books are substantial in size, with thick spines and dense, closely packed pages. The overall look is classic and scholarly, evoking the feel of antique or archival volumes.
description: A stack of three large, antique-style books with dark green, textured covers and gold labels, one book propped open atop the others.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propped open book with its gold label visible and the textured covers of the stacked books beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, yellowed pages and the angled position of the top book leaning against the stack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back cover of the open book and the stacked arrangement of the two lower books.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled top book and the layered appearance of the book spines and pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark green with a textured surface and a rectangular gold label, but no visible text or decorative elements are apparent. The design is simple and classic.
